title: 400PCS Tile Leveling System 3mm 300pcs Tiling Level Wedge Spacer Plus 100pcs Resuable Wedges with A Tile Leveling Plier (1/8 Inch Tile Spacers)
features: Updated design for the joints to make removal of the clips more easily and quickly.
It is 300 pieces 3mm (1/8inch) tile spacers and 100 pieces reusable wedges and a tile leveling plier.
Saves tile installation time with less effort and amazing results - perfectly flat surface: floor, wall or ceiling.
The tile leveling system ensures flatness between tiles avoiding movements during the mortar setting.
Warranty: 12 month return and life time support, money back or new item for replacement.
